watchdog_orgs_searched: Democracy for the Arab World Now (DAWN)
notes: In-window negative/reputational coverage was dominated entirely by the 20 July 2026 Houthi Red Sea naval blockade declaration on Saudi Arabia (surfacing under both the Saudi-Iran/regional-geopolitics and oil themes). All other watchdog/NGO and negative-theme results were out-of-window (RSF 2026 Index in April, Freedom House 2026 report in May, Amnesty items 9 July / June, various annual reports). Israeli outlets excluded per hard rule; Saudi-owned outlets excluded per hard rule.
